# Appendix C: Spiritual Practices {.unnumbered}

Here is a listing of spiritual practices found within the Kitáb-i-Aqdas:

-   Prayer
    -   Daily Obligatory Prayer (in private)
    -   Prayer of the Signs
    -   Prayer for the Dead (congregational)
    -   Personal Prayer (in private)
-   Recitation
    -   Recitation of the verses of God
-   Remembrance (Dhikr)
    -   Subconscious Remembrance
    -   Conscious Remembrance
        -   Alláh-u-Abhá 95 times daily
-   Reflection
-   Honoring God
    -   Building and Using Mashriqu’l-Adhkárs
    -   Pilgrimage (Baghdad or Shiraz)
    -   Rights of God (Ḥuqúqu’lláh)
    -   Engaging in an Occupation
    -   Zakat
    -   Ayyám-i-Há (Days of Giving)
    -   Fasting
    -   Monthly Hospitality
    -   Festivals
        -   Festival of Naw Rúz
        -   Festival of Riḍván
        -   Festival for the Declaration of the Báb
        -   Festival for the Twin Birthdays

{{< pagebreak >}}
